_comment: Rate card: model-id -> USD per 1,000,000 tokens. in_uncached = input cache-MISS price; in_cached = input cache-HIT (prompt-cache) price; out = output (completion) price. An UNKNOWN model id (one not listed here) is reported as 'rates unknown' by the cost report — never silently priced at 0. Edit this file (or pass --rates PATH to bench) to add/override a row. Numbers are USD/Mtok; the cost code divides by 1e6.
_sources: DeepSeek published per-Mtok pricing (verified 2026-06-09): https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing — deepseek-chat/deepseek-reasoner are the non-thinking/thinking modes of deepseek-v4-flash (legacy names, deprecated 2026-07-24) and share its pricing.
deepseek-v4-flash: input cache-miss $0.14, input cache-hit $0.0028 (1/10 of miss, ~98% off), output $0.28 per Mtok.
deepseek-v4-pro: input cache-miss $1.74, input cache-hit $0.0145, output $3.48 per Mtok.
OpenAI/local rows are illustrative example rates, not authoritative — verify before billing.
